purpose: Repeatable Azure evidence-lab scenarios for CRIS-SME live dataset generation.

scenarios.title: Clean SME Baseline
scenarios.risk_intent: Create a small tagged Azure estate with conservative network and storage defaults.

expected_findings.expectation: May appear if tenant-level identity signals are unavailable from the current Azure CLI permissions.
Should not fire from lab resources because no public administrative ingress is deployed.
Should not fire from lab resources because blob public access is disabled.

scenarios.title: Public Exposure Stress Lab
scenarios.risk_intent: Introduce explicit public SSH/RDP NSG exposure and public blob evidence without deploying a reachable workload.

expected_findings.expectation: Should fire because the lab NSG allows inbound SSH and RDP from the internet.
Should fire if the collector identifies permissive public network exposure.
Should fire because blob public access and a public container are intentionally enabled.

scenarios.title: Governance Drift Lab
scenarios.risk_intent: Create a minimal estate with intentionally incomplete tagging and no compensating governance resources.

expected_findings.expectation: May fire if the collector observes tag coverage gaps.
May fire if budget-alert evidence remains unavailable or absent.

scenarios.title: Data Protection Stress Lab
scenarios.risk_intent: Stress storage and key-management evidence paths with public blob access and a Key Vault without purge protection.

expected_findings.expectation: Should fire because blob public access is intentionally enabled.
May fire if Key Vault purge-protection or key-management posture is observed as weak.

scenarios.title: International Media Office Demo Lab
scenarios.risk_intent: Create a small public-communications style Azure estate for cyber-security training and CRIS-SME evidence collection without touching the real client environment.

expected_findings.expectation: Should not fire from lab resources because only web ports are exposed; no SSH or RDP rules are created.
May fire because the lab includes intentionally public content storage to model a public media asset channel.
Should not fire from lab resources because resources are tagged with scenario and dataset metadata.

scenarios.title: International Media Office Delegated Architecture
scenarios.risk_intent: Create a richer media-office training architecture with delegated network zones, public communications storage, private editorial storage, monitoring workspace, and protected key management.

expected_findings.expectation: Should not fire for administrative exposure because no SSH or RDP ingress is deployed.
May fire because data services exist without matching private endpoint coverage.
May fire because the public media content storage account intentionally allows public blob access.
May improve compared with smaller labs because a Log Analytics workspace is present, but diagnostic coverage may still be partial.
